experiment: T1 iter37 — phase-locked items 9+12 chain-step-routed POST-K=500

formula.experiment: T1 iter37 — phase-locked items 9+12 features routed POST-K=500 at chain step level
formula.slot: A of T1 Glass-Ceiling Push 2026-05-10 (master prereg results/preregistration_t1_ceiling_push_20260510_134829.json, FWER n=4)
formula.family_wise_independence_claim: Member of master pre-registered family n=4. Bonferroni-adjusted gate frac>0 ≥ 0.9875 vs iter12-honest-n93 AND vs iter34-n93 to claim supersede.

cohort.filter: PD with full items 9-14, 15, 18 (matches iter34 / iter33-B 8-item filter)

model_ensemble: CustomChain(XGBRegressor hist, n=500, lr=0.05, depth=4, min_child=5)
stage2.ensemble_method: average chain-output across 3 bases per fold per seed
stage2.feature_select_method: lgb_importance_top_k_per_fold (V2 only; PL features bypass selector)

phase_locked_routing.item_9: PL9 (12 cols) appended only when chain step's target item id == 9
phase_locked_routing.item_12: PL12 (13 cols) appended only when chain step's target item id == 12
phase_locked_routing.audit_emission: per-fold per-seed per-base routing audit emitted to lockbox JSON
phase_locked_routing.K500_pool_unchanged: V2 only; PL features never enter K=500 importance ranking
phase_locked_routing.codex_load_bearing_requirement: key by target item identity, not chain position (RegressorChain order='random')

stage2.post_combine_formula: Stage1_pred + (sum_over_T1_SUM_ITEMS(mean_over_bases(item_pred) + train_mean) - sum(train_mean[T1_SUM_ITEMS]))  -- aux items 15,18 in chain only
stage2.decorrelation_argument: F36-D demonstrated K=500 absorbs phase-locked features when added to the V2 pool. Slot A bypasses K=500 by routing PL features at the chain step matching their item id, post-K500. Distinct from F35-C (slot replacement removed chain coupling); chain coupling is preserved.

phase_locked_caches.leakage_argument: Deterministic signal-processing aggregates of raw IMU around TUG seat-off / turn-peak. UPDRS labels never enter extraction.

eval.headline_metric: CCC of mean-of-3-seed predictions vs y_t1
eval.comparator_iter12_honest_n93_oof: computed live in same SID-aligned LOOCV

screen_gate.promote_to_lockbox_iff: Δ̄ vs iter34-5fold ≥ +0.025 (mean over 3 seeds) AND paired-bootstrap (5000) frac>0 ≥ 0.95
screen_gate.rule_post_2026_05_05: seed-std<0.020 floor dropped per user instruction

lockbox_rules: ONE pre-registered config. ONE LOOCV run. SLOT A of FWER n=4 family.
Headline = CCC of mean-of-3-seed preds (each seed averages 3 base learners).
Bonferroni-adjusted Verdict gates: frac>0 ≥ 0.9875 vs iter12-honest-n93 AND vs iter34-n93.
Seed list immutable from registration. No seed addition after seeing metrics.
5-null gate (scrambled, canary, transductive) recorded alongside lockbox JSON.
